title: miR-215 targeting Novel Genes EREG, NIPAL1 and PTPRU Regulates the Resistance to E.coli F18 in Piglets
author: Dai, Chaohui
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure S1. Sequencing results of firefly luciferase recombinant vectors for miR-215 target genes. The sequences marked with a red box represent the recombination sequences. Figure S2. Sequencing results of miR-215 target genes interference vectors. The sequences marked with a red box represent the recombination sequences. Figure S3. ELISA standard curves of pro-inflammatory cytokines TNF-α and IL-1β. Figure S4. Sequencing results of wild-type and mutant luciferase vectors in the core promoter region of miR-215 target genes. The sequences marked with a red box represent the recombination sequences. Table S1. Information of quantitative PCR primers. Table S2. Oligo sequences for RNAi. Table S3. Amplification primers for promoter region of miRNA-215 target genes. Table S4. BSP Primers Information. Table S5. Wild-type and mutant oligo sequences in the core promoter region of genes.
